meaning: n.蒙头斗篷,连有头巾的修道士服,(烟囱顶上的)通风帽
examples: The cowl does not make the monk.
The cowl (or hood) does not make the monk.
He put on his cowl when It 'started raining.
New Corvettes are tough, lightweight, rock-solid machines, immune to the cowl shake that plagued older models.
The aircraft underwent normal overnight maintenance which included opening the cowl doors and checking the oil levels, the report said.
